---
title: "The KROEG Index"
format: html
---

This is an index comparing the amount of Third Places ([see methodology for a full description](./methodology.html)) across postcode areas in the Netherlands. High values mean a higher availability of Third Places than in other postcodes. The Kroeg index is constructed for a range of sectors. Below, you can choose the sector you want to visualise.

<label for="sector-select">Choose an index:</label>
<select id="sector-select">
  <option value="third_places_total_ranked">All Third Places</option>
  <option value="third_places_non_medical_total_ranked">All Third Places without Medical Facilities</option>
  <option value="third_places_non_medical_non_retail_total_ranked">All Third Places without Medical Facilities and Retail Stores</option>
  <option value="third_places_medical_ranked">Medical Facilities only</option>
  <option value="third_places_retail_ranked">Retail Stores only</option>
  <option value="third_places_food_beverage_ranked">Food & Beverage Places only</option>
  <option value="third_places_community_ranked">Community Spaces only</option>
  <option value="third_places_cultural_ranked">Cultural Venues only</option>
  <option value="third_places_sport_leisure_ranked">Sports & Leisure Places only</option>
</select>

<label for="urbanisation-select" style="margin-left:20px;">
  Urbanisation:
</label>
<select id="urbanisation-select">
  <option value="all">Across the whole Netherlands</option>
  <option value="1">Extremely urbanised</option>
  <option value="2">Strongly urbanised</option>
  <option value="3">Moderately urbanised</option>
  <option value="4">Hardly urbanised</option>
  <option value="5">Not urbanised</option>
</select>

<iframe
  id="dashboard-frame"
  src="plots/third_places_total_ranked.html"
  width="100%"
  height="900"
  style="border:0;">
</iframe>

<script>
const sectorSelect = document.getElementById("sector-select");
const urbanSelect = document.getElementById("urbanisation-select");
const frame = document.getElementById("dashboard-frame");

function updateDashboard() {
  const sector = sectorSelect.value;
  const urban = urbanSelect.value;

  if (urban === "all") {
    frame.src = `plots/${sector}.html`;
  } else {
    frame.src = `plots/${sector}_by_urbanisation_${urban}.html`;
  }
}

sectorSelect.addEventListener("change", updateDashboard);
urbanSelect.addEventListener("change", updateDashboard);
</script>
